title: Realistic Sleep'in
description: With this mod you can sleep at any time you want.
body:
# **🛌 Realistic Sleep'in**
**Have you ever wondered why Steve can only sleep on a strict schedule and under perfect conditions? In the real world, we can take a nap at noon, go to bed early, or crash even if there's a thunderstorm raging outside (or monsters lurking nearby).**

The Realistic Sleep'in mod brings true realism to Minecraft's sleep mechanics, giving you total control over your rest!

✨ Key Features:
Sleep Anytime: Forget the annoying "You can only sleep at night" message. Want to take a quick afternoon nap? Go ahead. Need to sleep through the day? You got it.

Sleep Through the Danger: No more "You may not rest now, there are monsters nearby". If your character is exhausted, a few skeletons outside your base won't stop them from passing out.

🛠 How it works:
Just place down any bed and right-click. The mod fits seamlessly into vanilla gameplay without bloating your game with complex mechanics—it just adds that much-needed layer of logic and freedom.

_Note: Perfect for realism-focused modpacks, hardcore survival, or players who just want to play by their own rules!_
